items.summary:
BougeRV Movable Area Light

Buy for $24 (Reg. $40)

What we love

If you’ve got outdoor summer adventures awaiting you, this BougeRV portable area light would make a handy addition to your kit, though it’s also a convenient device to have year-round, too. It possesses an internal 3,200mAh battery that can handle lighting spaces, tents, more for up to six nights on each charge, complete with five adjustable brightness levels, four lighting modes, and an emergency S.O.S. signal. What’s more, it has the double function to power personal devices as a power bank.

items.title: Segway’s GT3 electric superscooter is a more affordable thrill-ride packed with features at its $1,500 low
items.summary:
There are only a handful of days left to jump on Segway’s Summer EV Sale deals, and rather than spending over $2,000 on the latest supercharged e-scooter, you can instead go with the GT3 Electric SuperScooter for $1,499.99 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing over at Amazon. Despite its $1,900 MSRP, you can usually find this model starting at $1,700, with 2026 having given us discounts down to $1,637 before this rate became the more frequent price point we’ve seen during sales. For the rest of May, you can jump on it with a $200 markdown off the going rate (and $400 off the MSRP), giving you a more thrill-inducing ride for the all-time lowest price we have tracked, which lands $1,000 under the newest GT3 Pro Electric SuperScooter currently.

We have seen more than a few chances to land the more pricey 13-inch M4 iPad Air models in the $100 off range, even as much a $110 off, the entry model though…not so much. However, Amazon is now offering its best price to date on the base model 13-inch at nearly $100 off the list price.

items.title: Silkland’s compact 240W USB/Thunderbolt 4 cable hits $13.50
items.summary:
Silkland 240W 40Gb/s USB/Thunderbolt 4 Cable

Buy for $13.50 (Reg. $16)

What we love

Long cables can be super handy, but in my opinion the same can be said for short cords that get straight to the point without a bunch of unwanted slack just cluttering things up. It spans just one foot in length, which could be perfect for a desk setup or a quick and easy cable that won’t take up much space in your travel bag.

more…

items.title: Easily download security cam footage with Acer’s 2-in-1 SD card reader, now $9.50 (Save 27%)
items.summary:
Acer 2-in-1 Type-C SD Card Reader

Buy for $9.50 (Reg. $13)

What we love

I have four HomeKit security cameras that have motion clips in the cloud, but they also record to a microSD card around the clock so I can take a deeper dive if I ever need to. There have been times when I needed to, and that’s precisely why I am happy I have a similar card reader in my tech bin.

more…

items.title: Keep the back seat entertained with this iPad mount for just $10 Prime shipped (44% off)
items.summary:
LISEN iPad Car Headrest Mount

Buy for $10 (Reg. $18)

What we love

It doesn’t matter if you have a long road trip on the horizon or are simply looking for ways to keep the back seat occupied during a daily commute, this $10 accessory can go a long way for the price. It may even give you a reason to give that old iPad in a drawer a new lease on life.

items.title: Semi-rimless sunglasses are my go-to style, grab three pairs for $14.50 (Save 34%)
items.summary:
KALIYADI Semi-Rimless Polarized Sunglasses (3-pack)

Buy for $14.50 (Reg. $22)

What we love

The semi-rimless style here has been my go-to for years now. I’ve got a couple pairs, one in my crossbody bag and the other in my car. I dig having a couple strategically placed so I can easily reach for them whenever the need arises. With three pairs in tow, you’ll be able to do the same.

items.summary:
Here’s a fresh mid-week list of Nordstrom markdowns for you to quickly scope out, consider, and get back to your day. We scoured the official sale page on your behalf, but you can always check that out for an even larger list of deals. Highlights this time around include Carhartt Work In Progress Logo Pocket T-Shirt, Vans Logo Crewneck Sweatshirt, 925 Originals Marathon Graphic Print T-Shirt, and more. Just note that you can also score golf shorts with a smartphone pocket for $24, fashionable Bruno Marc sneakers at $27, and much more in our apparel guide. Head below to see today’s Nordstrom deals.

items.title: This 7-in-1 travel power strip delivers a 65W USB-C port for $30 (Reg. $40)
items.summary:
ORICO 65W 7-in-1 USB-C Travel Power Strip

Buy for $30 (Reg. $40)

What we love

A lot of travel power strips top out at 15-25W USB-C ports, but this model steps that all the way up to 65W. This makes it powerful enough to fast charge flagship smartphones and also top off off tablets, laptops, and more. It strikes a nice balance if you ask me, and I love that it can be wrapped up to easily fit in a travel bag.

items.title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup
items.summary: Today is the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200. Once the clock strikes 11:59 p.m. PT, the window closes on your chance to compete for $100,000 in equity-free funding, gain global visibility, connect directly with investors, and launch on the TechCrunch Disrupt stage.

items.title: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose’s former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M
items.summary: SOND introduced its debut product: Dreambuds, a closed-loop, in-ear system that captures 12 physiological signals from the wearer, then acts on them in real time to help consumers get better sleep.

items.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Early Bird ticket savings end in 3 days
items.summary: There are only 3 days left to save up to $410 on your ticket to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Early Bird pricing ends May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT, and once the deadline passes, ticket prices increase. If you plan to attend one of the most influential gatherings in tech this year, now is the time to lock in your pass before rates go up again.
